title: Vivecraft Perfected
description: A modpack for quickly getting into minecraft vr
body:
This modpack is a quick nearly no setup fun to play VR experience.

Delivers a optimization focused VR experience with the option for shaders for a beautiful experience.

Essential is included in the modpack! If you don't trust essential you could disable it and add E4MC.

**NOT RECOMMENDED FOR USE ON SEREVRS WITH ANTI CHEATS**

**MOST** additional mods you can add will most likely work just fine.

**The standard is NO shaders or BSL shaders**

Shaders and a few texture packs are included to customize a little to your own silly needs.

I recommend giving minecraft **8GB of RAM** and using the java argument **-XX:+UseZGC**
[Recommended RAM and Java arguments](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5506571b4a72e3548e7118cdc18082c3e9335244.png)
